alcipan.title: Drywall & Suspended Ceiling Systems
alcipan.metaTitle: Istanbul Drywall Installer & Suspended Ceilings - Uzman YP
alcipan.metaDesc: Professional drywall partition walls, suspended ceilings, plastering, and decorative coving. Quality drywall contractor services in Istanbul.
alcipan.desc: We design aesthetic and functional spaces using drywall partition walls and suspended ceiling systems with premium materials to partition spaces, provide ceiling aesthetics, and increase thermal/sound insulation.

yangin-yalitimi.title: Firestopping & Passive Fire Protection
yangin-yalitimi.metaTitle: Passive Fire Protection & Firestop Barriers - Uzman YP
yangin-yalitimi.metaDesc: Internationally certified passive firestop systems, fire-rated partition walls, and joints to prevent fire propagation in structures.
yangin-yalitimi.desc: We install internationally certified passive firestopping (Firestop) systems at utility crossings and joints to prevent fire spread, maximizing structural fire safety.

ses-yalitimi.title: Sound & Acoustic Insulation
ses-yalitimi.metaTitle: Soundproofing & Acoustic Insulation Contractor - Uzman YP
ses-yalitimi.metaDesc: Professional soundproofing solutions for acoustic comfort. Wall, floor, and ceiling sound insulation systems.
ses-yalitimi.desc: We implement professional soundproofing systems for floors, ceilings, and walls to minimize sound transmission between floors/rooms, prevent noise pollution, and ensure acoustic comfort.

dekorasyon.title: Interior Decoration & Renovations
dekorasyon.metaTitle: Interior Architecture & Turnkey Home Office Renovation - Uzman YP

dekorasyon.desc: We run turnkey renovation, decoration, interior architectural design, and painting works with our professional teams to make your living and working spaces aesthetic, comfortable, and functional.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.desc: We have answered the most frequently asked questions about our drywall, suspended ceiling, soundproofing, and passive firestopping implementations.
Faq.q1: How long do drywall and suspended ceiling installations take?
Faq.a1: It varies depending on the size of the project. Drywall partitions and suspended ceiling works for a standard room are completed in 1-2 days. Whole home or office renovations can take 1-2 weeks.
Faq.q2: Why are passive firestop systems mandatory?
Faq.a2: According to fire protection regulations and international building codes, installing certified firestop barriers at cable and pipe penetrations to prevent the spread of fire and dsmoke is a legal requirement.
Faq.q3: How much noise does sound insulation block?
Faq.a3: With our high-density rockwool, acoustic drywalls, and specialized sound barriers, we can absorb 70% to 90% (averaging 45-55 dB) of airborne sound transmission between rooms.
Faq.q4: Do you offer turnkey solutions for interior decoration and renovations?
Faq.a4: Yes; we run all renovation phases, including drywall, plastering, painting, electrical works, and flooring, from a single source as turnkey solutions with our professional crew.
